sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Paakte a palhna mun, tuidam a luanna mun,
Mualkuamah hong gum Topa tawh ka pai ding
hi;
Ama hong paiihna tengah ka zuizui ding hi,
Zawhna lukhu ngah dong ka zuizui ding
hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka zui ding hi! Jesuh ka zui ding hi,
Gamlapi gam khempeuh ke’n ka zui
ding hi!
Ka zui ding hi! Jesuh ka zui ding h i,
Hong makaihna mun tengah ka zui ding
hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Huihpi a nung a tuipi nakpi a luanna,
Mual kuamah hong gum Topa tawh ka pai
dinga;
Amah in ka khut hong let ciangin ka lau kei ding,
Topa in hong nai laitak ka lau thei
kei.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Guam thukpi ahi a, keen sang dawn ahi zong,
Hong hon Topa tawh ka om khawm dinga
tawp dong;
Ama totsa lampi tawnin kei hong ciahpih ding,
Pasian’ mual tung kikhopna hong
tunpih ding.
